Video.summary: Did you know a large part of your immune system resides in your gut? Our gut microbiome plays a huge role in our overall health but oftentimes have been overlooked as nothing but a digestive workhorse.
Video.title: Hannah Kleinfeld: Gut Health and the Microbiome: Improving and Maintaining the Microbiome with Probiotics + More

Image.alt: Hannah Kleinfeld: Gut Health and the Microbiome: Improving and Maintaining the Microbiome with Probiotics + More
Hannah Kleinfeld: Gut Health and the Microbiome: Improving and Maintaining the Microbiome with Probiotics + More
Hannah Kleinfeld: Gut Health and the Microbiome: Improving and Maintaining the Microbiome with Probiotics + More

Video.summary: Jeremiah Ramirez, founder of The Marathon Group, seeks $750,000 to propel his financial brokerage dedicated to promoting financial literacy and insurance sales. Despite Ramirez's personal drive stemming from past hardships, the panelists question the feasibility of his plan, particularly his proposal to cover agents' continuing education costs.
Video.title: Fund Tank - The Marathon Group

Image.alt: Fund Tank - The Marathon Group
Fund Tank - The Marathon Group
Fund Tank - The Marathon Group

Video.summary: Matthew Aarsvold, the owner and president of IKW Solutions, takes center stage, seeking $1,000,000 to elevate his innovative software, Constantly Current. This cutting-edge prototype promises to transform Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems by ensuring they remain updated seamlessly, offering potential time and cost savings for businesses.
Video.title: Fund Tank - IKW Solutions

Image.alt: Fund Tank - IKW Solutions
Fund Tank - IKW Solutions
Fund Tank - IKW Solutions

Video.summary: Sherri Loomer seeks $100,000 to elevate her cherished venture, Your Animal's Best Friend, to the next level. With a profound dedication to animal care, Sherri outlines her company's journey, emphasizing its mission to offer unparalleled pet services. Despite hurdles, such as a steep rent hike, overcoming breast cancer, and the necessity for more staff, Sherri's commitment to her enterprise is evident.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Your Animals Best Friend

Image.alt: Fund Tank - Your Animals Best Friend
Fund Tank - Your Animals Best Friend
Fund Tank - Your Animals Best Friend

Video.summary: In this episode, weĺll talk with several experts on the often stigmatized topic of sexual intimacy among older adults. Weĺll also share information on how seniors can slow the spread of Parkinsonĺs disease, deal with symptoms of menopause, and reduce their risk of Alzheimerĺs.
Video.title: Health Tips for Seniors

Image.alt: Health Tips for Seniors
Health Tips for Seniors
Health Tips for Seniors

Video.summary: In this episode, weĺll cover common public health issues caused by smog, pollen, and other environmental hazards. Weĺll also discuss how to avoid Lyme disease, West Nile virus, and sinusitis.
Video.title: Health and the Environment

Image.alt: Health and the Environment
Health and the Environment
Health and the Environment

Video.summary: In this episode, weĺll speak with experts on how the lack of accessibility to basic healthcare has affected people around the country, as well as what steps can be taken to ensure greater health equity.
Video.title: Fighting Health Inequity

Image.alt: Fighting Health Inequity
Fighting Health Inequity
Fighting Health Inequity

Video.summary: In this episode, weĺll talk with a former cancer patient who was treated with psilocybin about his experiences, as well as a psychiatry professor who has spent decades researching the effects of medical hallucinogens.
Video.title: Drug Treatment and Therapy

Image.alt: Drug Treatment and Therapy
Drug Treatment and Therapy
Drug Treatment and Therapy

Video.summary: In this episode, weĺll be discussing the dangers of drug abuse and addiction, speaking with doctors and survivors of opioid abuse on the factors behind the recent spike in addiction across the country.
Video.title: Drug Abuse and Overdoses

Image.alt: Drug Abuse and Overdoses
Drug Abuse and Overdoses
Drug Abuse and Overdoses

Video.summary: Sherianna shares how to effectively use mantras and how they can positively influence your thinking and raise your vibration to match your desires.
Video.title: Mantras Made Easy With Sherianna Boyle

Image.alt: Mantras Made Easy With Sherianna Boyle
Mantras Made Easy With Sherianna Boyle
Mantras Made Easy With Sherianna Boyle

Video.summary: Jennifer shares that no matter what you experience, you get to decide how you react to these situations and what role you play in them.
Video.title: How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers

Image.alt: How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers
How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers
How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers

Video.summary: Did you know being active in the gym could improve your activity in the bedroom? Everything you wanted to ask about sex but didnĺt. Now you can on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out

Image.alt: Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out
Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out
Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out

Video.summary: A man gets terrible headaches right at the height of passion. And a woman wonĺt talk about her sexual desires. What should her partner do? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Itĺs Alright to Talk About Sex

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Itĺs Alright to Talk About Sex
Sex Talk - Itĺs Alright to Talk About Sex
Sex Talk - Itĺs Alright to Talk About Sex

Video.summary: Over 800 Fights in her Life Professional MMA Fighter Julia Dorny, What get in Martial Arts when you train in over 6 Arts, you get the professional MMA Fighter in Julia Dorny! She is humble and amazing and is training for her upcoming fights. She is a podcaster with her show Women Hit Harder! Get ready and get involved in the conversation!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny

Video.summary: From Hell to Heaven's Doors, From Crime to having Quality Time Author Denise Jones! We are about to get deep in conversation with a young lady that came from the Chicago Crime , drugs and Jail to coming out to finding the light of success and glory! This will take you through the pain and passion of what she and her mom went through, turn your speakers up and get inspired!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones

Video.summary: R&B Singer Kerry James influenced by his Icons..So he dedicated a song to his Mom! Kerry James born in Chicago, but moved to the King of Pop Michael Jackson hometown Gary, Indiana and started signing and has been accomplishing many milestones in his life. We had a blast with Kerry and all of the things that he has accomplished and other obstacles! Support this gentleman!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Kerry James

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Kerry James
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Kerry James
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Kerry James

Video.summary: What you all need to know is that we had a blast with Robert Griffin aka Chief 1 Love, was talking about his journey and the love of the game! You are going to hear some great stories and you will have a great time watching!

Video.summary: Founder, Glenn Marsden, of Imperfectly Perfect Campaign, and Jeremy Jackson, former Baywatch star share their personal journeys with body dysmorphia and how it led to a worldwide campaign. A young man faces his fears and a tale of kindness at 30,000 ft.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect
Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect
Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect

Video.summary: Laura Di Franco, CEO of Brave Healer Productions, discusses brave healing and the power of sharing our stories. And, meet Oyen the ginger cat and adorable kids from India, along with Daaji redefining meditation for a joyful heart.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Video.summary: Admissions tells a transformational tale about what it takes to find lasting peace.
Video.title: Admissions

Video.summary: Director Kelly Noonan Goresĺ HEAL takes us on a scientific and spiritual journey where we discover that our thoughts, beliefs, and emotions have a huge impact on our health and ability to heal. We have more control over our health and life than we have been taught to believe.
Video.title: HEAL

Video.summary: Lack of physical activity is a growing problem, with over 50% of adults and 80% of young people in high-income countries being insufficiently active. The documentary JUST MOVE! ENDING THE COUCH POTATO PANDEMIC shows how we can reignite the desire for movement and overcome inactivity.
Video.title: JUST MOVE! ENDING THE COUCH POTATO PANDEMIC

Image.alt: JUST MOVE! ENDING THE COUCH POTATO PANDEMIC
JUST MOVE! ENDING THE COUCH POTATO PANDEMIC

Video.summary: The rise of guru Bhagwan and his model commune in Poona and oregon in the 1970s & 1980s told by his former close disciples, his personal secretary and bodyguard. A spiritual journey to the depths and shallows of the human soul.
Video.title: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD

Image.alt: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD
GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD
